match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_1",
    "title": "Applying Coral Lipstick",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett applies coral lipstick at vanity",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. VANITY - DAY",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "preparatory intimate fresh and sensory mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_2",
    "title": "Beach Promenade with Lipstick",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett takes lipstick to the shoreline and continues walking",
    "durationSeconds": 15,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI PROMENADE - DAY",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "fresh, sensory, breezy coastal mood with effortlessly cool energy"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
